summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of SignGuy AI MVP. Backend: 64/64 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major pages and flows verified successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: Multi-tenant registration and isolation (7 cross-tenant tests)
Backend: Auth flows (register, login, logout, password reset with dev endpoint)
Backend: Customer CRUD operations
Backend: Quote creation and idempotent conversion to order
Backend: Order management with order items (add, update, delete)
Backend: Multiple work orders per order (3 work orders created for 1 order)
Backend: Invoice idempotent creation (one per order)
Backend: Payment idempotency with auto-status updates (partially_paid -> paid)
Backend: File upload with tenant scoping and authentication
Backend: Email service with SendGrid unconfigured handling (status='failed')
Backend: Dashboard summary with counts and lists
Backend: Audit trail with actor fields (all events have actor_user_id and actor_email)
Backend: Permission enforcement (staff cannot create users but can create customers)
Backend: Unauthenticated file access blocked (401)
Frontend: Tenant registration flow
Frontend: Dashboard page rendering with data-testid
Frontend: All 8 sidebar navigation items present
Frontend: Customer creation via dialog
Frontend: All major pages accessible (Customers, Quotes, Orders, Invoices, Documents, Email History, Settings)
Frontend: Settings page shows user info, permissions (20 perms), and team table
